pageContext.name: Cthulhu Zippermouth
pageContext.description: The Call of Cute-Thulhu  Introduced in H.P. Lovecraft's short story 'The Call of Cthulhu', Cthulhu is a formidable and ancient elder god. Also known as one of the Great Old Ones, this cosmic entity is part octopus, part dragon, and part human.   Towering at 9.5' huge, Cthulhu is a green creature with a bulbous head, furrowed brow, wings on his back, and a tentacle-laden mouth. Unzip his mouth to find his red forked tongue and an ocean liner he's devouring.   Like all of our Zippermouths™, Cthulhu is a sculptural plush. He's stitched with great precision using top-quality materials and designed to hold his shape no matter how long he's trapped beneath the Pacific Ocean in the sunken city of R'lyeh.   Pair Cthulhu up with his other frightening friends: Vampire Stitch and Pennywise the Clown from our new Spooky Zippermouth™ collection.
